KPI Bluebook

Key Performance Indicators:

  • Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
  • Cooling Water Delta-T (°C
  • .DS Store
  • kpi flare recovery pct
  • SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m3
  • Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
  • Yield Percentage (%
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF
  • Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
  • On-Spec Rate (%
  • OEE %
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day
  • Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton
KPI Bluebook
  • .DS Store
  • View page source

.DS Store

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm Edit
Description
  • DS Store is a file created by macOS to store custom attributes of a folder
  • such as the position of icons or the choice of a background image
  • It is typically hidden and not intended for user interaction
Objective
  • The objective of monitoring
  • DS Store files is to ensure that unnecessary files do not accumulate in directories
  • which can lead to confusion and clutter in file management systems
Formula

This KPI does not have a formula as it pertains to the presence and management of .DS Store files rather than a calculable metric.

See code context for implementation details.
Generation time 11.3s (AI 11.0s + Render 0.4s)
Total: 11.326s • AI: 10.973s • Render: 0.352s
Extraction rate % 88.9%
Error rate % 11.1%
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI is relevant in the context of file management and system optimization
  • particularly in environments where macOS is used
Input Measure
  • The presence or absence of
  • DS Store files in specified directories
Unit of Measure Count of .DS Store files detected.
Reporting Source File system audits and monitoring tools that track file types and their occurrences.
Comments Regular checks for .DS Store files can help maintain a clean file structure and improve overall system performance.
